query:
生成一张微博新闻/热点配图，横幅宽图，严格16:9比例，专业纪实摄影风格。

场景：城市黄昏的天际线，霓虹灯渐亮，行人匆匆，远处高楼反射着落日余晖，真实现场感强，光影对比戏剧化。

风格：新闻纪实感，像手机现场拍摄的高级照片，冲击力与真实并存，锐利细节，8K质感。

文字水印：
- 大标题（醒目位置，黑体或现代字体）：“城市里的安静时刻”
- 副文：“黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙”
- 水印（底部或右下）：“@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察”

画面横向延展，留白充足便于文字，整体专业高级，像真实微博热帖配图。

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

image_job.error: LLM 返回不是合法 JSON

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending-topic banner, strict 16:9 horizontal format, photojournalistic documentary style.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, handheld mobile-camera aesthetic with high-end editorial finish, sharp details, dramatic chiaroscuro in the spirit of street photojournalism
Composition: wide horizontal panoramic frame, city skyline centered, generous negative sky area in upper third for text overlay, rule-of-thirds horizon line, 24mm wide-angle perspective
Subject: urban skyline at dusk with silhouetted pedestrians rushing in foreground, distant skyscrapers reflecting warm sunset glow on glass facades
Scene/backdrop: dense city downtown at golden hour transitioning to blue hour, neon signs beginning to illuminate, wet pavement with light reflections, hazy atmospheric depth
Lighting/mood: dramatic contrast between warm amber sunset backlight on buildings and cool blue twilight sky, neon accent glows in pink and cyan, high-contrast shadows with luminous highlights, emotionally resonant and cinematic tension
Color palette: deep amber and burnt orange as dominant warm tones, cool indigo-blue sky as counterpoint, neon pink and cyan as accent punctuation, silhouetted figures in near-black
Materials/textures: glass curtain-wall reflections, wet asphalt surface with mirror-like puddles, atmospheric haze softening distant towers
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" as large bold headline in prominent position; "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle; "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as watermark at bottom-right corner
Constraints: all three text elements must be legible and correctly rendered; headline uses heavy Gothic or modern sans-serif; sufficient blank sky area preserved for text placement; 16:9 aspect ratio strictly maintained
Avoid: artificial HDR halos, over-saturated toy-camera look, deformed human figures, blurry unreadable text, cluttered composition with no breathing room, stock-photo generic skyline

final_prompt.prompt:
A photorealistic wide-format editorial news photo of a city skyline at dusk, shot in a documentary street photography style as if captured on a high-end smartphone at the scene. The golden-orange remnants of sunset reflect off distant glass skyscrapers while neon signs and streetlights begin to glow in the deepening blue twilight, creating dramatic contrast between warm and cool light. Pedestrians move briskly across the foreground, slightly motion-blurred, reinforcing the sense of real-time capture. The composition is wide and cinematic, with generous negative space across the upper and lower thirds to accommodate text overlays. Sharp foreground details fade into a softly lit urban depth. The overall mood is simultaneously urgent and quietly contemplative — the kind of image that stops a scroll. Overlaid text elements are embedded in the image: a bold Chinese headline in a modern black sans-serif font placed prominently reads "城市里的安静时刻", a subtitle beneath it reads "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", and a watermark in the lower-right corner reads "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察". Photorealistic, 35mm equivalent lens, shallow depth of field, natural grain.
Negative Prompts: no artificial HDR halos, no oversaturated sky, no deformed pedestrians, no extra limbs, no blurry text, no missing text, no watermark omission, no daytime lighting, no studio backdrop.
Aspect Ratio: 16:9.
